_comment: VERIFY: .mcp.json shape (mcpServers map, command/args/env keys) against your installed Claude Code version. This file is committed so the team shares the same MCP servers; secrets must come from the environment, never inline. Example below is a read-only docs server — adjust or remove for your session. The marketplace-as-attack-surface rule (Part 3) applies to MCP servers too: an MCP server runs with the agent's privileges, so vet it like any dependency.
